# sevalla_applications (Data Source)

Use this data source to list all Sevalla applications.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sevalla_applications" "all" {}

output "application_names" {
  value = [for app in data.sevalla_applications.all.applications : app.display_name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `applications` (Attributes List) The list of applications. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--applications))

<a id="nestedatt--applications"></a>
### Nested Schema for `applications`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) When the application was created.
- `display_name` (String) The display name of the application.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the application.
- `is_suspended` (Boolean) Whether the application is suspended.
- `name` (String) The system-generated name of the application.
- `source` (String) The source type of the application.
- `status` (String) The current status of the application.
- `type` (String) The application type.
- `updated_at` (String) When the application was last updated.
